description: Letter from Yiṣḥaq ha-Levi, in Jerusalem, to an unknown addressee, probably in Cairo. In Hebrew. Dating: No earlier than 1525 CE. Concerning a debt and a lawsuit and Avraham b. Yiṣḥaq Sholal. See description and transcription on FGP for further information.
description_he: מכתב מירושלים לקהיר. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
